violations.description: The news ticker uses CSS animation to auto-scroll text continuously. There is no mechanism for users to pause, stop, or hide the moving content. This fails WCAG 2.2.2 (Pause, Stop, Hide).
violations.reference_fix: Add a pause button: <button aria-label="Pause ticker" onclick="document.querySelector('.ticker span').style.animationPlayState='paused'">⏸</button>

violations.description: The scrolling news ticker does not use aria-live or role='marquee' to announce updates to screen reader users. Moving text content needs to be programmatically conveyed.
violations.reference_fix: <div class="ticker" role="marquee" aria-live="off" aria-label="Breaking news ticker">

violations.description: Advertisement image is missing alt attribute. If the image is decorative, use alt=''. If it conveys information, provide descriptive alt text.

page_description: A news website with a continuously auto-scrolling ticker, story cards, and an advertisement image. The ticker has no pause mechanism or ARIA attributes, and the ad image lacks alt text.
